title: Fix the three skills documenting non-existent phases + retire the stale 'never a blocker' prose (D6)
action: D6: bee-exploring/SKILL.md:73 says `--phase exploring-complete`, bee-planning/SKILL.md:99 says `--phase planning-complete` and `--phase validated`, bee-validating/SKILL.md:82 says `--phase validated`. NONE are in KNOWN_PHASES, so handleStateSet throws every time an agent follows its own skill verbatim — which teaches it to improvise the state machine. Replace each with a real phase from the enum (the completion meaning already lives in the approved gate, not in a phase name). Then retire the prose that asserted the now-reversed posture: the cells.mjs:521 header comment ('Pure read — never a blocker, only a signal') must say it is advisory everywhere EXCEPT the compounding-complete boundary, and bee-compounding/SKILL.md:77 ('Prose-ruled, never hook-enforced (D7)') must say the close is now mechanically refused while debt stands. Keep both cells.mjs trees byte-identical.

truths: no shipped SKILL.md instructs a --phase value outside KNOWN_PHASES
cells.mjs:521 no longer claims scribing debt is 'never a blocker'
bee-compounding/SKILL.md no longer claims the rule is 'never hook-enforced'

trace.outcome: Three shipped skills were teaching phases that do not exist (bee-exploring: exploring-complete; bee-planning: planning-complete + validated; bee-validating: validated) — state set threw every time an agent followed its own skill verbatim, which is what taught the agent to improvise the state machine. All fixed to real enum members. A new test now scans every shipped SKILL.md and reference and fails on any --phase outside KNOWN_PHASES, so this cannot silently return. Also retired the two prose claims the fix reversed (cells.mjs 'never a blocker'; bee-compounding 'never hook-enforced').
trace.verification_evidence:
=== The D6 guard is NOT vacuous — proved by re-introducing the bug ===
$ printf 'state set --phase planning-complete\n' > skills/bee-hive/references/_tmp_regression_probe.md
$ node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs
FAIL  no shipped SKILL.md or reference instructs a --phase value outside KNOWN_PHASES (chain-integrity D6)
      these skills instruct a phase that does not exist (state set will throw, and the agent will improvise):
  bee-hive/references/_tmp_regression_probe.md: --phase planning-complete
Legal phases: idle, exploring, planning, validating, swarming, reviewing, scribing, compounding, grooming, compounding-complete

$ rm skills/bee-hive/references/_tmp_regression_probe.md
